creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
On Tue, 08 Aug 2000 08:52:25 +1000, Robert Mills wrote:

> I appologise for causing any inconvenience. I'll ensure that I retest
> any suspect problems before reporting them next time. You guys are doing
> a great job and it certainly was not my intention to throw bogus
> bug reports at you.

What is it that they always say about having to fall off a horse seven
times before you can call yourself a rider?

Everyone makes mistakes. :-)

Ciao,
Sheldon.
